---
title: "Photos"
---

A few snapshots from fieldwork, conferences, and life outside the lab.

---

### Fieldwork / Lab

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Caption describing the photo](images/photo1.jpg)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Caption describing the photo](images/photo2.jpg)
:::
::::

---

### Conferences & Events

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Caption here](images/photo3.jpg)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Caption here](images/photo4.jpg)
:::
::::

---

### Personal / Travel

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Caption here](images/photo5.jpg)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Caption here](images/photo6.jpg)
:::
::::
